Get Started
Part of Mezzofy Exchange Protocol | View Ecosystem

COUPON MARKETPLACE

GLOBAL EXCHANGE HUB FOR DIGITAL COUPONS

The only secure peer-to-peer coupon exchange enabling B2B, B2C, and C2C transactions. Built on tokenization technology to create a secondary market for digital promotions with fraud-proof validation.

List Your Inventory Explore Marketplace

The Coupon Exchange Protocol

Traditional digital promotions are failing due to fragmentation, high costs, and security risks. Mezzofy eliminates the obsolete model and replaces it with a high-liquidity, high-performance Exchange Protocol.

From Tool to Network

We focus on network effects and secure settlement, not just features. Build real value through connections across the global marketplace.

Unrivaled Security

Every promotion is standardized into the Mezzofy Coupon Standard, a proprietary protocol that guarantees unique, fraud-proof digital assets.

AI-Native Infrastructure

Our data is machine-readable, making us the standard interface for the next generation of autonomous AI shopping agents.

Three Marketplace Models, One Platform

Mezzofy powers coupon exchange across all transaction types, creating a comprehensive ecosystem for digital promotion distribution

B2B MARKETPLACE

Business to Business

Mezzofy serves as the central exchange hub connecting merchants with distributors, resellers, and channel partners. List your coupon inventory and gain instant access to global distribution networks.

  • Wholesale Distribution: Sell coupon inventory in bulk to distributors and resellers
  • Channel Partner Network: Connect with marketing platforms, loyalty programs, and affiliate networks
  • Cross-Promotion Opportunities: Trade inventory with complementary businesses for mutual benefit
  • Transparent Pricing: Real-time market pricing with automated settlement and commission tracking

Merchant → Distributor

Turn coupon liabilities into high-performing digital assets with global reach

Business → Consumer

Direct customer engagement with personalized promotional campaigns

B2C MARKETPLACE

Business to Consumer

Enable direct-to-consumer coupon distribution through Mezzofy's hosted inventory platform. Businesses can list, manage, and distribute coupons directly to end customers through multiple channels.

  • Direct Distribution: Push coupons to customers via email, SMS, social media, and mobile apps
  • Personalized Campaigns: Target specific customer segments with tailored promotional offers
  • Real-Time Analytics: Track redemption rates, customer engagement, and campaign performance
  • Multi-Channel Reach: Distribute through marketplaces, e-commerce platforms, and retail partners
C2C MARKETPLACE

Consumer to Consumer

Mezzofy enables the first truly secure peer-to-peer coupon exchange. Consumers can transfer, gift, trade, or sell unused coupons to other consumers, creating a secondary market that increases overall redemption rates.

  • Transferable Coupons: Gift or transfer coupons to friends and family with secure validation
  • Secondary Marketplace: Trade or sell unused coupons to maximize value and reduce waste
  • Fraud Prevention: Blockchain-inspired tokenization ensures each coupon is unique and valid
  • Increased Redemption: Unused coupons find new owners, driving actual business value for merchants

Consumer ↔ Consumer

Peer-to-peer coupon exchange with fraud-proof validation

How The Exchange Works

1

List Inventory

Merchants list coupon inventory on the Mezzofy Exchange. Set pricing, terms, and distribution preferences for your digital assets.

2

Match & Trade

Our exchange protocol matches supply with demand. Distributors, businesses, or consumers discover and acquire coupons through secure transactions.

3

Validate & Settle

Fraudless validation ensures every redemption is legitimate. Automated settlement processes handle payments and commissions instantly.

Exchange Platform Features

Real-Time Pricing

Dynamic market pricing based on supply and demand

Fraud Prevention

Tokenized coupons with unique digital signatures

Instant Settlement

Automated payment processing and commission tracking

Deep Analytics

Track performance, redemption rates, and ROI

Global Reach

Access to 15+ markets across Asia-Pacific

API Integration

Seamless integration with existing systems

Flexible Pricing

Pay only when coupons are redeemed

24/7 Support

Expert assistance whenever you need it

Works Seamlessly with the Mezzofy Ecosystem

Coupon Marketplace integrates with other Mezzofy products to create a complete solution

+ Coupon Management

Create and manage inventory before listing on marketplace

+ Coupon Marketing

Sell your marketplace inventory directly to consumers

+ Bridge API

Integrate marketplace access into your platform
